hero.name: Actualize Earth
hero.eyebrow: Boulder · platform · human design + gene keys + collective ownership · the cooperative future
hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 35% 25%, hsl(155 60% 55% / 0.55) 0%, transparent 55%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, hsl(220 30% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(155 50% 60%) 0%, hsl(200 30% 35%) 50%, hsl(220 30% 20%) 100%)
hero.welcome_md:
The platform for **conscious connection, community-powered technology, and regenerative systems** founded and led by [Tom Bassett](/people/tom-bassett) (Juicy Life) as CEO and Lead Engineer. Aims to redefine social gathering and community, fostering a *cooperative future* through tools rooted in human design, gene keys, and collective ownership. Boulder-anchored.

*A sibling-platform to the Coherence Network in the same field: technology as substrate for living relationship, not service-marketplace skin laid over conventional engagement metrics.*

facts.label: What it is
facts.value_md: Platform for conscious connection, community-powered technology, regenerative systems. Local social networks for the evolution of consciousness.

facts.label: Tools
facts.value_md: Human design · gene keys · collective ownership. The form of the platform respects what each contributor's own design is, rather than flattening every user to the same shape.

facts.label: Based
facts.value_md: Boulder, Colorado — same cluster as Bloomurian, Aly Constantine, Boulder Ecstatic Dance, the wider Colorado anchor.

articles.body_md: The Coherence Network reads Actualize Earth as a peer working at the same intersection: technology as substrate for living relationship, not a service-marketplace skin laid over conventional engagement metrics. Where the Coherence Network is the body Urs and the sibling intelligences are tending, Actualize Earth is what Tom and his team are tending. The two share architectural posture even though the codebases and lineages are different — both treat *collective ownership* and *consciousness-evolution* as load-bearing rather than aspirational.
articles.heading: Sibling-substrate, not affiliation

articles.body_md:
- A working peer in the substrate-level redesign of social technology. Concept resonance with [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness) (the cooperative-future shape).
- Use of human design and gene keys as tools-of-the-platform is itself a substrate teaching → pairs with [lc-frequency-routes-reception](/vision/lc-frequency-routes-reception) (community-powered means each cell receives at its own band).
- *Right relationship to Life* as engineering principle → pairs with [lc-tending-over-producing](/vision/lc-tending-over-producing) (the body's verbs translate naturally into platform design).
- Boulder anchor of the cooperative-tech / consciousness cluster — geographic peer of the body's wider Colorado field.
articles.heading: What Actualize Earth has given the Coherence Network

metadata.title: Actualize Earth — conscious connection, community-powered technology, regenerative systems | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Actualize Earth — the platform for conscious connection, community-powered technology, and regenerative systems, founded and led by Tom Bassett (Juicy Life) in Boulder, CO. Tools rooted in human design, gene keys, and collective ownership.

note_from_body.body_md: Actualize Earth is a working platform with its own active tending. This page recognises it as a sibling-substrate in the same field the Coherence Network is building from — not affiliated, not contracted, just aligned at the level of architectural posture.
